remarks.zh: 窗户制造的多行输出示例。根据需要调整偏移量 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output berbilang baris untuk pembuatan tingkap. Laraskan offset seperti yang diperlukan (AI translated, please check)

remarks.vi: Ví dụ về đầu ra nhiều dòng cho việc gia công cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh bù nếu cần (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng maraming linya ng output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပြတင်းပေါက်ဖန်တီးရာတွင် မျှောလင့်ထားသောထွက်နိုင်သောဟာအသုံးအဆောင်နမူနာဖြစ်သည်။ Offset များကိုလိုအပ်သလိုြေမှုတည်သည် (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ការផលិតបង្អួចរបស់ផ្សេងៗ សូមកែទម្រង់កិនត្រូវនៅចាំការរចនាតាមហាន។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງຜົນໃຊ້ຄືນໃນການຜະລິດປ່ອນ. ປັບແປ່ນໃຫ້ເເມື່ອຈຳເປັນ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: 窓製作のための複数行出力例。必要に応じてオフセットを調整してください (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 창문 제작을 위한 다중 라인 출력 예제입니다. 필요에 따라 오프셋을 조정하십시오 (AI translated, please check)
